tool_args.label: Availability Definition
tool_args.raw_text: Availability measures the percent of time that a unit is running and available for customer service.

payload.claim_text: Availability measures the percent of time that a unit is running and available for customer service.
payload.subject: Availability

tool_args.label: Atlantic Terminal Elevator Human Factor Injuries 2023
Jamaica Elevators/Escalators Maintained by Port Authority
tool_args.raw_text: Jamaica elevators and escalators maintained by the Port Authority except for platform F equipment.

payload.gap_text: Jamaica elevators and escalators maintained by the Port Authority except for platform F equipment.
payload.missing_information: Jamaica station elevator/escalator availability data excludes Port Authority-maintained equipment except platform F.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Jamaica elevators and escalators maintained by the Port Authority except for platform F equipment.

tool_args.label: Injury Numbers Subject to Change
tool_args.raw_text: These numbers are subject to change based upon additional customer injury reports and claims that may be received after the reporting period end date of December 31, 2023.

payload.gap_text: These numbers are subject to change based upon additional customer injury reports and claims that may be received after the reporting period end date of December 31, 2023.
payload.missing_information: Injury and entrapment counts may be revised based on reports received after Dec 31, 2023.

evidence_refs.source_quote: These numbers are subject to change based upon additional customer injury reports and claims that may be received after the reporting period end date of December 31, 2023.

tool_args.label: Injury Definitions
tool_args.raw_text: Mechanical includes sudden changes in speed, handrail, alignment. Human Factor includes lost balance, encumbrances, Slip/Trip/Fall, pushed/shoved, intoxication, caught between, etc. Entrapment is defined when customers are removed from an elevator with special tools or training.

payload.claim_text: Mechanical includes sudden changes in speed, handrail, alignment. Human Factor includes lost balance, encumbrances, Slip/Trip/Fall, pushed/shoved, intoxication, caught between, etc. Entrapment is defined when customers are removed from an elevator with special tools or training. These events require intervention but not necessarily involve a customer injury.
payload.subject: Injury definitions
